hadith.chapterTitle: The Desirability of undertaking a Journey in a Group and appointing a Leader
hadith.body:
Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Were people to know of what I know about the dangers of travelling alone, no rider would travel alone at night."

[Al-Bukhari].
- عن ابن عمر رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏"‏لو أن الناس يعلمون من الوحدة ما أعلم ما سار راكب بليل وحده” ‏(‏‏(‏رواه البخاري‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏
